log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Harengon — Armored Tank (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Harengon — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:18+9=27 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Harengon — Armored Tank. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Harengon — Armored Tank.
→ Harengon — Armored Tank: CON save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 20] FAIL! 39 necrotic damage. HP: 20/59
--- Harengon — Armored Tank --- HP: 20/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
